title: Explosive Arrows / TNT Arrows
description: A very simple fabric mod that adds explosive/TNT arrows to minecraft.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/LtMMUeX.png)

A very simple fabric mod that adds explosive arrows to minecraft.

You are now able to change explosive strength via config from json or mod-menu - **New in 1.2.0**!

## Crafting
* **1.20.1+**: Combining arrow and TNT block in **crafting table**
* **1.19.4**: Combining arrow and TNT block in **smithing table**

[Reasoning of this change described here.](https://i.imgur.com/VG5wc9r.png)


## Details
* Works as a normal arrow for bow, crossbow, dispenser, etc.
* On hit of enemy or block, it will explode like a normal TNT block does.
* The arrows are not able to be picked up.
* Arrows will not blow up if they are submerged in water.

## Customizable
* explosionPower
* explodeOnBlockHit
* explodeOnEntityHit
* waterCancelsExplosion
* breakBlocks
* smokeTrail

### Limitations
Arrows cannot be "tipped" with potions
